zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Dunbar於大約1280年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴時，她的父親Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar39歲，母親Lady Marjorie Comyn25歲。她和Richard of Lundie至少有1個兒子。她去世於1393年10月19日享年114歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Dunbar was born about 1280, in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar, was 39 and her mother, Lady Marjorie Comyn, was 25. She had at least 1 son with Richard of Lundie. She died on 19 October 1393, at the age of 114.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Dunbar est née environ 1280, à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjorie Comyn, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard of Lundie. Elle est décédée le 19 octobre 1393, à l’âge de 114 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Dunbar um 1280 in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar 39 und ihre Mutter Lady Marjorie Comyn 25. Sie hatte mit Richard of Lundie mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 19. Oktober 1393 im Alter von 114 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Dunbar è nata il circa 1280 nel Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lady Marjorie Comyn, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard of Lundie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1393, all'età di 114 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Dunbarが約1280年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーで生まれた時，父Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbarは39歳，母Lady Marjorie Comynは25歳であった。彼女はRichard of Lundieとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1393年10月19日に114歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Dunbar(이)가 대략 1280년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marjorie Comyn(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Richard of Lundie(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1393년 10월 19일 114세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Dunbar nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjorie Comyn, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Richard of Lundie. Ela faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1393, com 114 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Dunbar родилась около 1280 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjorie Comyn, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard of Lundie. Она умерла 19 октября 1393 г. в возрасте 114 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Dunbar nació aproximadamente 1280, en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Marjorie Comyn, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Richard of Lundie. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1393, a la edad de 114 años.
